mapper.select: select admin_id as adminId, username, display_name as displayName, role, password_salt as passwordSalt, password_hash as passwordHash, enabled from admin_account where username = #{username} limit 1
select admin_id as adminId, username, display_name as displayName, role, enabled from admin_account where admin_id = #{adminId} limit 1

select count(1) from user_account a left join user_profile p on p.user_id = a.user_id where 1 = 1
and ( a.account like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or a.phone like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or a.email like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or p.nickname like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or p.real_name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
and a.enabled = 1
and a.enabled = 0

select a.user_id as userId, a.account, a.phone, a.email, a.enabled, p.nickname, p.real_name as realName, p.verified, p.verify_status as verifyStatus from user_account a left join user_profile p on p.user_id = a.user_id where 1 = 1
and ( a.account like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or a.phone like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or a.email like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or p.nickname like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or p.real_name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
and a.enabled = 1
and a.enabled = 0
order by a.user_id desc limit #{size} offset #{offset}

select a.user_id as userId, a.account, a.phone, a.email, a.enabled, p.avatar_url as avatarUrl, p.nickname, p.gender, p.grade, p.college, p.major, p.interest_tags as interestTags, p.bio, p.real_name as realName, p.verified, p.verify_status as verifyStatus, (select count(1) from home_post hp where hp.publisher_user_id = a.user_id) as postCount, (select count(1) from home_post_report hr where hr.reporter_user_id = a.user_id) as reportCount from user_account a left join user_profile p on p.user_id = a.user_id where a.user_id = #{userId} limit 1

select p.id, p.plaza, p.publisher_user_id as publisherUserId, p.category, p.title, p.status, p.tags, p.description, p.expected_time as expectedTime, p.expected_location as expectedLocation, p.aa_fee as aaFee, p.publisher_name as publisherName, p.publisher_status as publisherStatus, p.publisher_status_note as publisherStatusNote, p.anonymous, p.verified, p.current_count as currentCount, p.max_count as maxCount, p.current_state as currentState, p.hope_you_can as hopeYouCan, p.preferred_way as preferredWay, p.gentle_replies as gentleReplies, p.review_status as reviewStatus, p.deleted, p.created_at as createdAt, p.updated_at as updatedAt from home_post p where p.id = #{postId} limit 1
mapper.update: update home_post set review_status = #{reviewStatus}, updated_at = now() where id = #{postId}
update home_post set deleted = #{deleted}, updated_at = now() where id = #{postId}
mapper.select:
select count(1) from home_post_report r where 1 = 1
and r.status = #{status}

select count(1) from auth_center_record r where r.auth_type = 'campus'
and r.status = #{status}

select record_id as recordId, user_id as userId, auth_type as authType, school, student_no as studentNo, real_name as realName, identity_type as identityType, material_name as materialName, material_url as materialUrl, status, feedback, submitted_at as submittedAt, reviewed_at as reviewedAt from auth_center_record where record_id = #{recordId} and auth_type = 'campus' limit 1
mapper.update: update auth_center_record set status = 'passed', verified = 1, feedback = #{feedback}, action_text = '查看详情', reviewed_at = now() where record_id = #{recordId} and auth_type = 'campus' and status = 'pending'

update auth_center_record set status = 'rejected', verified = 0, feedback = #{feedback}, action_text = '重新提交', reviewed_at = now() where record_id = #{recordId} and auth_type = 'campus' and status = 'pending'
mapper.select: select announcement_id as announcementId, title, content, status, created_by as createdBy, created_at as createdAt, updated_at as updatedAt from admin_announcement order by updated_at desc, announcement_id desc

select announcement_id as announcementId, title, content, status, created_by as createdBy, created_at as createdAt, updated_at as updatedAt from admin_announcement where announcement_id = #{announcementId} limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into admin_announcement (title, content, status, created_by) values (#{title}, #{content}, #{status}, #{adminId})
mapper.select: select id, plaza_key as plazaKey, category_name as categoryName, enabled, sort_weight as sortWeight from home_plaza_category order by plaza_key asc, sort_weight asc, id asc
select id, plaza_key as plazaKey, category_name as categoryName, enabled, sort_weight as sortWeight from home_plaza_category where id = #{categoryId} limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into home_plaza_category (plaza_key, category_name, enabled, sort_weight) values (#{plazaKey}, #{categoryName}, 1, #{sortWeight})
insert into admin_system_message (target_type, target_user_id, title, content, created_by) values (#{targetType}, #{targetUserId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{adminId})
insert into admin_operation_log (admin_id, action, target_type, target_id, detail) values (#{adminId}, #{action}, #{targetType}, #{targetId}, #{detail})
mapper.select: select count(1) from admin_operation_log

select l.log_id as logId, l.admin_id as adminId, a.username, l.action, l.target_type as targetType, l.target_id as targetId, l.detail, l.created_at as createdAt from admin_operation_log l left join admin_account a on a.admin_id = l.admin_id order by l.created_at desc, l.log_id desc limit #{size} offset #{offset}
select 0
select count(1) from home_post where review_status = 'pending' and deleted = 0
select count(1) from home_post_report where status = 'pending'
select count(1) from auth_center_record where auth_type = 'campus' and status = 'pending'
select count(1) from user_account
select count(1) from home_post where deleted = 0
